oneLiner: A native macOS terminal emulator (SwiftUI + embedded Ghostty) with a workspace model and CLI built for driving Claude Code sessions.
next: Remote-workspace phase 2: forward the IPC socket + install shell integration remotely so a remote Claude pane gets live busy/idle, auto-title, and OSC-7 pwd tracking (deferred from PR #66).
Daily-drive the shipped app (now v1.5.12) and triage regressions; small follow-up candidates: Reset Name (custom→auto), worktree-leak-on-close, Escape-vs-⌘W placeholder binding.
Validate the /tian implement harness (bumped to v1.2.0 for the session model) on a real multi-slice run: async fan-out overlap + structured handoff (ADR 0003).

milestones.title: Agent delegation (/tian implement) shipped in a release

shipped.summary: Released v1.5.12 (build 562) — notarized + stapled, Gatekeeper-accepted, Sparkle appcast live. Ships the git-watch redesign (ADR 0005 / PR #94) plus follow-up fixes merged since v1.5.11.

Git-watch redesign (ADR 0005): replaced per-Session git watching with an app-global, repo-keyed GitMonitor — dedup watchers + global concurrency lanes (git-local 4 / gh-network 2), split refs(always-on)/working-tree(gated) FSEvents signal, visible+busy working-tree gating, cached repo detection, QoS .userInitiated→.utility, PR off the hot path (TTL 300s + backoff). Fixes the daily-drive lag (logs showed ~12k git spawns/3d, a 96/min 'Not a git repo' storm, dead-worktree churn, 899 uncapped gh calls, all while app CPU sat at 0.1%). SessionGitContext is now a thin adapter. Build + 1207 tests green; /code-review medium ran, 5 findings fixed. Shipped via 5-wave /orchestrate run.

Released v1.5.11 (build 553) — notarized + stapled, Gatekeeper-accepted, Sparkle appcast live. Ships PR #93 (busy-session CPU spike fix: TimelineView-driven relayout replaced with a static rainbow fill + CALayer-driven RainbowBorder) and PR #92 (Ghostty preference overrides in tian Settings).
